// src/components/Dashboard.js import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, BarChart, Bar, Cell } from "recharts"; import { DISASTER_ZONES, RESOURCES, ALERTS, ALLOCATION_TIMELINE, ZONE_NEED_SCORES } from "../data/mockData"; import "./Dashboard.css"; const SEV_COLOR = { critical: "#EF4444", high: "#F59E0B", medium: "#3B82F6", low: "#10B981" }; const TYPE_COLOR = { medical: "#EF4444", rescue: "#F59E0B", food: "#10B981", shelter: "#3B82F6" }; function NeedBar({ label, value, color }) { return (
{label}
{value}%
); } const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }) => { if (!active || !payload?.length) return null; return (
{label}
{payload.map((p) => (
{p.dataKey}: {p.value}
))}
); }; export default function Dashboard({ tick }) { const [selectedZone, setSelectedZone] = useState(DISASTER_ZONES[1]); const [clock, setClock] = useState(new Date()); useEffect(() => { const t = setInterval(() => setClock(new Date()), 1000); return () => clearInterval(t); }, []); const deployed = RESOURCES.filter((r) => r.status === "deployed").length; const standby = RESOURCES.filter((r) => r.status === "standby").length; const inTransit = RESOURCES.filter((r) => r.status === "in-transit").length; const critAlerts = ALERTS.filter((a) => a.type === "critical" && !a.acknowledged).length; const totalAffected = DISASTER_ZONES.reduce((s, z) => s + z.affectedCount, 0); return (
{/* Header */}

Command Dashboard

Real-time situational awareness — Smart Disaster Resource Allocation System

{clock.toUTCString().slice(17, 25)}
UTC · LIVE
{/* Top stats */}
Affected Persons
{totalAffected.toLocaleString()}
Across {DISASTER_ZONES.length} active zones
Resources Deployed
{deployed}
{inTransit} in transit · {standby} standby
Zones Covered
{DISASTER_ZONES.length}
1 critical · 2 high · 1 medium · 1 low
Unresolved Alerts
{critAlerts}
Critical requiring immediate action
{/* Main body */}
{/* Left col */}
{/* Zone list */}
Active Disaster Zones
{DISASTER_ZONES.map((zone) => (
setSelectedZone(zone)} >
{zone.name}
{zone.severity} {zone.type} · {zone.affectedCount.toLocaleString()} affected
{zone.resourcesDeployed} res
))}
{/* Priority scores */}
AI Priority Score
} /> {ZONE_NEED_SCORES.map((entry, i) => ( = 75 ? "#EF4444" : entry.score >= 55 ? "#F59E0B" : "#3B82F6"} /> ))}
{/* Center col */}
{/* Zone detail */} {selectedZone && (
Zone Detail
{selectedZone.name}
{selectedZone.severity.toUpperCase()}
Total Population
{selectedZone.population.toLocaleString()}
Affected
{selectedZone.affectedCount.toLocaleString()}
Disaster Type
{selectedZone.type}
Resources
{selectedZone.resourcesDeployed}
Critical Needs
)} {/* Allocation timeline */}
Resource Deployment Timeline
} />
{[["Medical","#EF4444"],["Rescue","#F59E0B"],["Food","#10B981"],["Shelter","#3B82F6"]].map(([l,c]) => (
{l}
))}
{/* Right col — recent alerts */}
Live Alerts
{ALERTS.map((alert) => (
{alert.message}
{new Date(alert.timestamp).toUTCString().slice(17,25)} UTC
))}
{/* Resource status */}
Resource Status
{RESOURCES.slice(0, 6).map((r) => (
{r.name}
{r.location}
{r.status}
))}
); }
